field_description: Primary editorial category for an Article. Categories are intentionally broader and more stable than free-form tags.

field_option.option_description: Platform identity, launch, community purpose, and brand-world content.
Beginner guidance about massage and spa visits.

field_option.option_label: Choosing Spas, Booking, Pricing and Reviews
field_option.option_description: Decision guidance for comparing, booking, pricing, and reviewing services.
Consent, boundaries, red flags, ethical conduct, and public trust.
Sanitation, linens, oils, service comfort, and cleanliness signals.
Massage modalities, bodywork traditions, and technique explainers.
Pressure, soreness, recovery, and aftercare guidance.
Accessible education about the body, posture, and stress.
Rest, sleep, burnout, and everyday wellness habits.

field_option.option_label: Oils, Products and Home Wellness Tools
field_option.option_description: Oils, tools, supplies, and home wellness products.
Pregnancy, seniors, disability, caregiving, and dignity-centered care.

field_option.option_label: Local Practice, Credentials and Global Spa Culture
field_option.option_description: Local practice, professional credentials, travel, and global spa culture.
Spa ownership, management, design, staffing, marketing, and operations.
Practitioner technique, conduct, safety, communication, and professional growth.
Imaginative or seasonal features that remain connected to wellness and massage.

field_description: Broad reader role the Article is written for.

field_option.option_description: Broad readers and the general public.
People considering, booking, or using massage and spa services.
Massage therapists, bodyworkers, wellness practitioners, and students.
Spa owners, managers, operators, and business decision-makers.
Family members and helpers supporting another person's care.
Readers navigating unfamiliar spa or wellness cultures.

field_description: Current publication state of an editorial record, independent from review approval and record lifecycle.

field_option.option_description: Not yet submitted or published.
Approved and queued for publication at a future time.
Published and available according to visibility rules.
Removed from publication without deleting its history.

field_description: Editorial category of a homepage Quote of the Day record, used for rotation, filtering, and seasonal selection. The option list follows the quote themes named in docs/06-user-interface/home-page-ui.txt section 20 (wellness, relaxation, massage, self-care, motivational). Proposed with the quote_main structure guide; not yet an accepted decision.

field_option.option_description: General wellness, health, and balanced-living quotes.
Calm, rest, and relaxation quotes.
Quotes about massage, touch, and bodywork.
Self-care and personal-restoration quotes.
Motivational and encouraging quotes.

field_description: Classifies one embedded internal record note. The option codes and meanings are taken from the record_note embedded structure defined in the article_main structure guide and reused by quote_main; this record centralizes that enumeration so it is not defined only inside PHP structure guides.

field_option.option_description: Editorial note for editors preparing or maintaining the record.
Review note recorded during editorial or approval review.
Administrative note about record handling.
Note documenting a correction to the record.
